query: SELECT id, name, offering, website_url, subreddits, keywords, ai_prompt, review_mode, status, min_sub_size, max_sub_size FROM outreach_campaigns WHERE name LIKE '%founder%' OR name LIKE '%Founder%' OR name LIKE '%SaaS%' OR name LIKE '%saas%' ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 5;
